compiled_state.title: RED: Write failing test for red team + blue team escalate_to_epic
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
Create tests/hooks/test-escalate-to-epic-taxonomy.sh asserting red-team-reviewer.md has Residual References category + escalate_to_epic type, and blue-team-filter.md recognizes escalate_to_epic.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/hooks/test-escalate-to-epic-taxonomy.sh
- [ ] Test fails (RED)
  Verify: ! bash tests/hooks/test-escalate-to-epic-taxonomy.sh 2>/dev/null
- [ ] .test-index updated with RED markers
  Verify: grep 'red-team-reviewer' .test-index | grep -q '\[test_'
